deadlines.title: Lab Assignment 5: CI/CD Pipeline Automation
deadlines.description: Ensure your code is pushed to your repository and build logs are attached.

deadlines.title: Live Webinar: SSP Automation, Native to Your Billing Platform
deadlines.description: Tabs' product and marketing leads will demonstrate how SSP runs natively inside your billing platform, built from real billing data, connected to your Product Catalog, and generating audit-ready documentation automatically. Topics include SSP and billing connection, transaction price allocation under ASC 606, and closing faster without manual reconciliation.

deadlines.title: Quiz of the Day
deadlines.description: Attempt the daily quiz to answer: Which pattern reflects volatility contraction before expansion? Options include Range, Channel, Gap, Triangle.

deadlines.title: Quiz: Bizquezt #33: Boardrooms and Blockbusters - Enrollment Deadline
deadlines.description: Enrollment for the 'Bizquezt #33: Boardrooms and Blockbusters' quiz. This is an individual participation quiz with 1 round. Enrol to unlock your chances to win amazing prizes!

deadlines.title: Quiz: DataQuezt #2 - Python for Data
deadlines.description: A single-round individual quiz contest focusing on Python for Data. Participate to learn and grow, and unlock chances to win amazing prizes. The quiz duration is set for August 2nd.

deadlines.title: Career Briefing Session: Jobs in IT Security & Cloud
deadlines.description: This session provides insights into career opportunities, industry trends, and required skills in IT Security & Cloud Computing. It includes information on a 100% Job Guarantee Program and live interaction with an industry expert. Open to B.Sc. IT/Computer Science, B.E. final-year students/graduates, and any graduate aspiring to build an IT career. Registration fee is ₹100 (breakfast included). Limited seats are available, so register soon.

deadlines.title: Quiz 3
deadlines.description: Quiz 3 will take place on August 5th.

deadlines.title: Assignment 4: Socket Programming
deadlines.description: Submit solutions for Socket Programming assignment.
